text:
うわーっ、やったっ！
これがヴィントバルガーの障壁ね……
うん、これならいけそう！

これでちょっと及び腰だった
スタッフのみんなも喜んでくれるわ。
本当にありがとう！

あっ、そうだ、お礼お礼！
いつもいつもありがとう！
また、よろし

Well lookie what just came fresh out of the
oven! So this is a Vint Balger barrier, hmm?
I think this might do the trick!

Now even my most timid kitchen staff
shouldn't be afraid to really go at it.
Thank you so much!

Oh, right, can't let you leave empty handed!
I really appreciate it.
I hope you come by to help again sometime!
